## Checklist

- [ ] This PR contains NO personal memory data (session summaries, corrections, people, project context)
- [ ] This PR modifies template/, docs/, tests/, or top-level files only
- [ ] No files under memory/ (outside template/memory/) are included

> **WARNING:** This is the Trellis distribution repo. Your personal memories
> belong in your Trellis install (`~/.trellis/`), NOT here. If your PR
> contains session data, corrections, or people information, close it
> immediately and check your git remotes.
